name: google-forms
description: Reads Google Forms metadata, form items, and submitted responses through the Google Forms REST API using an OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant.

risk.read: external Google Forms API read of form metadata, form items, and submitted responses

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback -- identical shape to gmail's bundle); hook-covered, proven by internal/connectors/hooks/google-forms/hooks_test.go (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real https token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
